---
title: How useful are tax disclosures in predicting effective tax rates? A machine learning approach
date: '2023-01-01'
author: [David A Guenther, Kyle Peterson, Jake Searcy, Brian M Williams]
publication: The Accounting Review, **5**, _297-322_ (2023).
categories: [justice]
url_source: 'https://publications.aaahq.org/accounting-review/article/98/5/297/10957/How-Useful-Are-Tax-Disclosures-in-Predicting'
url_preprint: ''
journ: The Accounting Review
issue: 5
page: "297-322"
year: 2023
image: ''
pub_number: 10
---
